name: North Indian Stuffed Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Leave stems on and slice eggplants in half lengthwise. Place cut side down in a pan. Cover and bake at 375°F for 30 to 40 minutes until tender.
2. While the eggplant is baking, boil potatoes until tender and drain. Mash with partially melted soya cheese in a large bowl.
3. Saute onions and dried spices (cumin seeds, coriander seeds, turmeric, hot red pepper, ground cloves) in oil for 1 minute.
4. Add garlic and ginger; saute until the onions are translucent.
5. Add carrots and cook for 5 minutes.
6. Add peppers and peas; cook until just tender.
7. Stir in tomatoes and lemon juice.
8. Combine the sauteed vegetables with the potato mixture.
9. Mash the eggplant pulp and push it to one side. Mound a quarter of the filling on each half of the eggplant.
10. Sprinkle sesame seeds over the top.
11. Bake for 15 minutes at 375°F, uncovered.
